Operation.Documentation:
Returns true if a guide has no assignment fora given number of weeks

@author Asma Gandour
Operation.Documentation_plain: Returns true if a guide has no assignment fora given number of weeks @author Asma Gandour
Operation.Name: isAvailableFor

Operation.Documentation:
Assigns this guide to members that require a guideuntil the guide is not available anymore

@author Asma Gandour
Operation.Documentation_plain: Assigns this guide to members that require a guideuntil the guide is not available anymore @author Asma Gandour
Operation.Name: performAssignmentToMembers
